rationale: Educ. Code §37.004 governs disciplinary placement of special education students. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The placement of a student with a disability who receives special education services may be made only by a duly constituted admission, review, and dismissal committee.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no cross-reference or fiscal linkage present.
